title: The FBI built its own replica small town to simulate real-world cyberattacks
snippet: Hidden inside a building in Alabama, the FBI has created its own small town as a dedicated cyber training ground for simulating cyberattacks.

title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
snippet: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.
